description: Provisioning agent workflow — system setup and configuration

phases.name: assess
phases.instruction: Check current system state. What's already configured? What's missing?

phases.name: plan
phases.instruction: Identify required changes. Check dependencies. Consider rollback options.

phases.name: execute
phases.instruction: Apply changes incrementally. Verify each step before proceeding. Log all changes.

phases.name: verify
phases.instruction: Confirm the system is in the expected state. Run health checks. Report results.

success_criteria: System is in the target state. All health checks pass. Changes are logged for rollback.
escalation_triggers: The change would break existing functionality
